name: Smart document crop
summary: Detect, crop and auto-orient receipts, invoices and documents from larger images before OCR.
description: Provides smartcrop:// routes for conservative document/receipt detection, cropping and orientation correction. The connector preserves the original image, returns structured crop + orientation metadata, and is designed to run before ocr:// so OCR engines see a portrait-oriented document with horizontal text lines rather than the full camera frame.

payloadOptions.auto_orient: Default true. Rotate the cropped document so text lines are horizontal.
payloadOptions.prefer_portrait: Default true. Prefer portrait output, useful for receipts and invoices.
payloadOptions.margin_ratio: Padding around the detected document before saving.
payloadOptions.fail_if_uncertain: On crop route, fail instead of returning the original when detection is uncertain.
